author: govinda dńĀsa
verses: jaya jaya jadu‚čÖkula‚čÖjalanidhi‚čÖcandra vraja‚čÖkula gokula ńĀnanda‚čÖkanda jaya jaya jaladhara ŇõyńĀmara aŠĻÖga helana kalpa‚čÖtaru lalita tri‚čÖbhaŠĻÖga sudha‚čÖi sudhńĀmaya murali‚čÖvilńĀsa jaga‚čÖjana‚čÖmohana madhurima hńĀsa avanńę vilambita vani vana‚čÖbńĀla madhukara jhaŠĻÖkaru tatahi rasńĀla taruŠĻáa aruŠĻáa ruci pada aravinda nakha‚čÖmaŠĻái nichani dńĀsa‚čÖgovinda
en_translation:
All glories, all glories to the Moon of the Yadu dynasty, the very root of joy for the residents of Vraja and Gokula!

All glories, all glories to Him whose body is dark like a cloud, who effortlessly surpasses the wish-fulfilling tree, and who stands in a charming threefold bending posture!

Nectarean are His pastimes with the flute, and His sweet smile enchants everyone in the world.

His forest garland sways low to the earth, and the bees hum there, attracted by the sweet aroma.

Govinda DńĀsa offers his adoration to the jewel-like nails of His lotus feet, which are as radiant as the rising sun.
